# Alcoa Aluminium Scaffolding

> UAE scaffolding rental and sale since 2008. Based in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates — serves Abu Dhabi and Musaffah with aluminium scaffolding, mobile towers, ladders, and steel cuplock systems. 24/7 delivery. Aluminium towers from AED 35/day.

## Contact
- Phone: +971 58 137 5601 / +971 50 926 8038
- Email: Sales@alcoascaffolding.com
- HQ: Musaffah Industrial Area, Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates
- Hours: Mon–Sat 8am–6pm; emergency dispatch available

## Location pages
- [Scaffolding Rental Abu Dhabi](https://alcoascaffolding.com/scaffolding-rental-abu-dhabi): Musaffah HQ, Yas Island, Saadiyat, AED 35–60/day towers
- [Scaffolding Rental Musaffah](https://alcoascaffolding.com/scaffolding-rental-musaffah): Warehouse pickup & industrial zone delivery
- [Scaffolding Near Me UAE](https://alcoascaffolding.com/scaffolding-near-me-uae): Abu Dhabi hire quotes

## Products
- [Aluminium Scaffolding](https://alcoascaffolding.com/products/aluminium-scaffolding): Mobile towers, single/double width, stairway, folding
- [Ladders](https://alcoascaffolding.com/products/ladders): Aluminium & fiberglass A-type, extension, platform ladders
- [Steel Cuplock Scaffolding](https://alcoascaffolding.com/products/steel-cuplock-scaffolding): Standards, ledgers, couplers, pipes, jacks
- [Couplers & Clamps](https://alcoascaffolding.com/products/couplers): Double, swivel, putlog, beam couplers, spigot pins

## Key services
- [Single Width Scaffolding](https://alcoascaffolding.com/services/single-width-scaffolding)
- [Double Width Scaffolding](https://alcoascaffolding.com/services/double-width-scaffolding)
- [Cuplock Standard](https://alcoascaffolding.com/services/cuplock-standard)
- [GI Pipe](https://alcoascaffolding.com/services/gi-pipe)
- [MS Pipe](https://alcoascaffolding.com/services/ms-pipe)
- [Scaffolding Delivery](https://alcoascaffolding.com/services/scaffolding-delivery)
- [Installation & Setup](https://alcoascaffolding.com/services/installation)

## Pricing (indicative AED)
- Aluminium towers: AED 35–60 / day
- Steel cuplock bay: AED 40–75 / day
- Ladders: AED 25–45 / day
- Couplers: AED 3–15 / piece / day
- Weekly & monthly discounts available
